title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot featuring a split AI brain architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for residential, industrial, and security applications. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, an open-source robot platform with Jetson Thor for researcher use.
